parameters.query: SELECT finding, category, priority, timestamp FROM gda_intelligence_log WHERE agency ILIKE '{{ $('Extract Inputs').first().json.target }}' OR agency = 'General' ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT target, timestamp, full_11q_result FROM gda_competitor_cache WHERE target ILIKE '{{ $('Extract Inputs').first().json.target }}' ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT title, agency, urgency, detail FROM gda_opportunity_alerts WHERE (agency ILIKE '{{ $('Extract Inputs').first().json.target }}' OR agency = 'General') AND expires_at > NOW() ORDER BY urgency DESC, timestamp DESC LIMIT 5

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ api_key: $env.TAVILY_API_KEY, query: $('Extract Inputs').first().json.target + ' defense contract award news 2025 2026', max_results: 5, search_depth: 'basic' }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', max_tokens: 4000, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $json.prompt }] }) }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO gda_intelligence_log (source, agency, finding, category, priority, timestamp) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6::timestamptz) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING

options.queryReplacement:
={{ [
  'OODA Loop',
  $('Parse OODA Response').first().json.target,
  ($('Parse OODA Response').first().json.summary || '').substring(0,1000),
  'ooda_analysis',
  (($('Parse OODA Response').first().json.confidence_score || 0) >= 75) ? 'HIGH' : ((($('Parse OODA Response').first().json.confidence_score || 0) >= 50) ? 'MEDIUM' : 'LOW'),
  $('Parse OODA Response').first().json.generated_at
] }}

parameters.body: ={{ (() => { const parsed = $('Parse OODA Response').first().json; const target = parsed.target || 'Unknown'; const act = parsed.act || {}; const items = []; const addItems = (arr, phase) => { (arr||[]).forEach(a => { if (a && typeof a === 'string' && a.length > 3) items.push(phase + ': ' + a); }); }; addItems(act.immediate_30d, '0-30d'); addItems(act.capture_30_90d, '30-90d'); addItems(act.proposal_90plus, '90d+'); const allActions = items.slice(0,5).join(' | '); return JSON.stringify({ action: 'create', item: '[OODA] ' + target + ' - ' + (allActions || 'Review analysis'), owner: 'Shawn', status: 'Open', source_meeting: 'OODA Loop - ' + target + ' (' + new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0] + ')' }); })() }}

parameters.query: SELECT id, target, timestamp, orient_summary, decision, act_items, created_at FROM gda_ooda_loops ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 20

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'ok', action: 'history', loops: $input.all().map(function(i) { return i.json; }) }) }}
